name: Oriental Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken wings in a mixture of garlic, ketchup, honey, soy sauce, and Dijon mustard for at least 30 minutes.
2. Arrange the marinated chicken wings in a pan.
3. Bake in the oven for half an hour, then turn the wings over and bake until they are browned on both sides.
